---
title: "Research"
output:
  html_document:
    theme: cerulean
    highlight: tango
---

<a href="https://digital.lib.washington.edu/researchworks/handle/1773/26844" target="_blank">Assessing the relationship between city growth and electricity use over time: A comparative analysis of Chandigarh and Seattle</a>, University of Washington, 2014

<a href="https://drive.google.com/file/d/0B8T2r7MVXupGc3JnTDRSazZJX0U/view?usp=sharing" target="_blank">Public Street and Area Lighting Inventory Phase 1: Survey Results</a>, Municipal Solid-State Street Lighting Consortium, Prepared for U.S. Department of Energy, 2014

<a href="https://drive.google.com/file/d/0B8T2r7MVXupGRXdTaFNxTDAxTE0/view?usp=sharing" target="_blank">Chandigarh Urban Lab, Solar-Spine</a>, University of Washington, 2014
